title: Wire bot.inventory.on('updateSlot') for real-time inventory ground truth
description:
Council finding: Inventory is reconstructed from 6+ partially-authoritative event paths with no single source of truth. bot.inventory.on('updateSlot') is not wired (confirmed in backlog TSK-0063, TSK-0163). The current approach relies on periodic GetStatus reconciliation which is inherently laggy.

Fix:
1. Wire bot.inventory.on('updateSlot') in MineflayerAdapter to emit structured slot events
2. Create UpdateSlotEvent in C# event model
3. Project slot events into WorldState.Inventory in WorldStateProjector
4. Add rate-limiting/batching on the JS side (updateSlot fires frequently during mining)
5. Reduce dependence on periodic GetStatus as a reconciliation crutch
6. Add metrics to track drift between event-sourced inventory and GetStatus snapshots

Referenced in: Data/Pages/council/2026-06-30-external-audits-council.md
Audit source: Audits B, C
